items.title: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
items.summary: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
items.summary: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Mark Zuckerberg says Meta is working on AI agents for personal and business use
items.summary: The CEO wants to make an agent so easy even his mom can use it.
